mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_member (group_id, user_id, role, nickname, joined_at, last_read_message_id) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{nickname}, #{joinedAt}, #{lastReadMessageId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT gm.*, u.username, u.avatar as user_avatar, u.email as user_email FROM group_member gm JOIN user u ON gm.user_id = u.id WHERE gm.group_id = #{groupId}
SELECT * FROM group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
